popularStory.headline: Mary of Lancaster, Baroness Percy (1320 – 1 September 1362)
popularStory.description: Mary of Lancaster, Baroness Percy (1320 – 1 September 1362), was the youngest surviving child of Henry, 3rd Earl of Lancaster by his wife Maud Chaworth. Through her father, she was a great-gran …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster於1320年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾圖特波利時，她的父親Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster40歲，母親Maud de Chaworth38歲。她於從1334年9月9日到1334年10月8日與Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy在英國斯塔福爾圖特波利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1362年9月1日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年42歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster于1320年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾圖特波利时，她的父亲Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster40岁，母亲Maud de Chaworth38岁。她于从1334年9月9日到1334年10月8日与Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy在英国斯塔福爾圖特波利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1362年9月1日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年42岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster was born in 1320, in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, was 40 and her mother, Maud de Chaworth, was 38. She married Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy from 9 September 1334 to 8 October 1334, in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 1 September 1362, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Alnwick, Northumberland, England.

fr.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster est née en 1320, à Tutbury, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Maud de Chaworth, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy du 9 septembre 1334 au 8 octobre 1334, à Tutbury, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 septembre 1362, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster 1320 in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster 40 und ihre Mutter Maud de Chaworth 38. Sie hat von 9. September 1334 bis 8. Oktober 1334 in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 1. September 1362 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Alnwick, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster è nata il nel 1320 nel Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Maud de Chaworth, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy da 9 settembre 1334 a 8 ottobre 1334, nel Tutbury, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 1 settembre 1362, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Alnwick, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancasterが1320年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアトゥトブリーで生まれた時，父Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancasterは40歳，母Maud de Chaworthは38歳であった。から1334年9月9日まで1334年10月8日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアトゥトブリーでHenry Percy 3rd Baron Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1362年9月1日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで42歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 테 카스틀 비w
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster(이)가 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 튜트버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Chaworth(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1334년 9월 9일부터 1334년 10월 8일까지 영국 스태퍼드실르 튜트버이에서 Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1362년 9월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster nasceu em 1320, em Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Chaworth, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy de 9 de setembro de 1334 a 8 de outubro de 1334, em Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1362, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: лисестир т кастл вию, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Plantagenet Mary of Lancaster родилась в 1320 г. в местности тутбури, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Chaworth, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy с 9 сентября 1334 по 8 октября 1334 в местности тутбури, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 1 сентября 1362 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия.

Se casó con Henry Percy 3rd Baron Percy desde 9 de septiembre de 1334 hasta 8 de octubre de 1334, en Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1362, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
